problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile operator shadow-pilot evidence request now needs a schema-backed local observation receipt so concrete deterministic observations can be recorded without granting runtime promotion authority.
success_criteria: a deterministic validator emits the operator shadow-pilot observation receipt from the current shadow dossier and evidence request
the checked-in local receipt matches the deterministic produced receipt
the schema allows collected local observations while denying runtime promotion, execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, success claims, and terminal closure
the receipt covers all five shadow dossier plan classes with receipt-bound observation refs and zero shadow mismatches
the receipt keeps runtime promotion blocked by runtime approval, replay/recovery, and terminal closure gates
focused tests cover schema compatibility, fixture parity, uncollected receipt rejection, missing promotion gate rejection, and authority-drift rejection
non_goals: do not add a router, worker, scheduler, connector, or runtime registration path
do not claim replay, recovery, or terminal closure evidence
do not replace the prior AwaitingEvidence intake packet
constraints: the observation receipt is local, read-only, deterministic, and reversible
runtime promotion remains AwaitingEvidence until separate approval, replay/recovery, and terminal closure evidence exists
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the validator does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: deterministic validator and produced receipt parity
SDLC design and security review artifacts
